title: Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements
use_when: Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements. Use when the user needs a product workflow for stakeholder management related to exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements. Trigger terms: ux-design, executive-communication, requirements, feedback-interpretation, stakeholder-management.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements when the request is mainly metric diagnosis, pricing, GTM, or implementation planning without UX evidence; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
framework_fit: Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements fits Design work in the Design lifecycle when the user needs Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks without tying recommendations to the user's Design stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements as generic Design advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $exec-feedback-without-context-to-actionable-design-requirements to turn this exec context into a decision-ready Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks.
examples.expected_artifact: Exec feedback without context to actionable design requirements UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
